digest.component_or_area: rebar terraform shared AWS infra (OIDC + auth_host SSO)
propositions: 18 shared/rebar-facing AWS resources left in decommissioned snap's dead shared terraform state must be re-homed into rebar's own terraform and state.
rebar's rebar-terraform-plan drift role hard-depends on the account-singleton GitHub OIDC provider that rebar assumes exists but does not own or create.
Adopted resources must preserve physical snap-demo-* names to avoid destroy/recreate, while moving ownership and retagging from project=snap-demo to Project=rebar.
Resources must be imported into rebar's state and released from snap's shared state so each is single-owner, with terraform plan reporting no changes and no secret rotation.
rebar infra docs must describe OIDC ownership and the SSO stack runbook, and changes land on main via Gerrit with green terraform-drift CI.
